mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPORT ( NO, REPORTER_NO, TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_NO, REASON, CONTENT, STATUS, REGDATE ) VALUES ( REPORT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{reporterNo}, #{targetType}, #{targetNo}, #{reason}, #{content}, 'WAITING', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT r.NO, r.REPORTER_NO, r.TARGET_TYPE, r.TARGET_NO, r.REASON, r.CONTENT, r.STATUS, r.REGDATE AS reg_date, r.UPDATE_DATE AS update_date, m.MEMBER_ID AS reporter_id, m.NAME AS reporter_name, b.TITLE AS target_title, b.CONTENT AS target_content FROM REPORT r JOIN MEMBER m ON r.REPORTER_NO = m.NO LEFT JOIN BOARD b ON r.TARGET_TYPE = 'BOARD' AND r.TARGET_NO = b.NO WHERE r.NO = #{no}
mapper.update: UPDATE REPORT SET STATUS = 'DONE', UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE NO = #{no} AND STATUS = 'WAITING'
